_comment: Project-level PostToolUse hooks. Global hooks from ~/.claude/settings.json still run; this file adds project-scoped automation that runs in addition. Use this for hooks that only matter to the EUROGRANT codebase (frontend lint, backend ruff).

hooks.command: node -e "const path=require('path');const m=require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8');try{const i=JSON.parse(m);const fp=i.tool_input?.file_path||'';if(fp.match(/\.py$/i)){const cmd='cd '+path.dirname(fp)+' && ruff check --quiet "'+path.basename(fp)+'" || true';console.log('[post-edit] ruff check on',path.basename(fp))}}catch(e){}"
hooks.description: Suggest running ruff check after a .py file edit (project-scoped reminder; non-blocking).

hooks.command: node -e "const m=require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8');try{const i=JSON.parse(m);const fp=i.tool_input?.file_path||'';if(fp.match(/\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$/i)&&fp.includes('/frontend/')){console.log('[post-edit] remember to run: cd frontend && npx eslint --fix',fp)}}catch(e){}"
hooks.description: Remind to run eslint --fix on frontend .tsx/.ts edits (project-scoped; non-blocking).
